OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Oct-23-2019 Off Calendar

Defendant Kristin Neland, Josh Neland Motion To Strike Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-26-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Defendant Kristin Neland, Josh Neland's Motion To Strike Complaint

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-26-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT KRISTIN NELAND, JOSH NELAND'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT.

Defendants' motion to strike portions of plaintiff's complaint is granted. Plaintiff seeks punitive damages, alleging that defendant "knowingly failed to stop at a stop sign and struck plaintiff, a pedestrian in a crosswalk, causing severe injuries." Plaintiff also alleges that defendant has multiple moving violations. Those allegations are insufficient to state a cognizable basis for an award of punitive damages. (see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
